title: SemanticEvent
description: Canonical append-only unit of the EOReader semantic ledger. event_id MUST be a hash of the canonical (schema_version, operator_epoch, op, site, observation_id, referents, frame, resolution, provenance, authority, inputs, payload) tuple via packages/spec/canonical-json. provenance and authority are kept as separate top-level fields deliberately (section 3.2) — neither may substitute for the other.

provenance.description: What this event depends on: prior observations, selectors, transformations.

authority.description: What entitles the observing agent to assert this event's frame/commitment.

inputs.description: Causal predecessor event_ids. Canonical order is topological with deterministic tie-breaking; this array is NOT the intrinsic identity of the event, and no engine module may call Date.now() to order events.
